localized_texts.text: eSIM Singapore Malaysia Kuota Besar | eSIM Singapura Global Komunika

A. NOTES- Make sure the device used supports eSIM. Please dial *#06#. When EID appears, the device used supports eSIM.- Write the date of use, telephone number and email in the note. (If there is no data, eSIM delivery will be delayed)- eSIM can only scan up to 3 times with the same device.- See point C for APN settings-Can't access TikTok, ChatGPT and Mobile Legends
QR can be scanned before or after arriving in destination country.
No need to replace the physical sim card.
Easy activation via QR scan that we send via email.

B. OVERVIEWActive Period:  3/4/5/6/7/8/10/15/30 DayQuota: 3/5/10/15/20/30/50GB. Quota can be used according to the active period without daily limits. If the quota has run out, the internet can still be accessed at a speed of 128 kbps.Speed: 4GCoverage: Singapore, Malaysia, IndonesiaTethering/Personal Hotspot: YesCall & SMS: NoTop Up: NoC. APN Setting & APN Personal Hotspot SettingsAPN: mobile.three.com.hkUsername & Password: emptyPersonal Hotspot APN is the same.
How to find out data usage: View data usage via phone settings.
If the esim has not been scanned, a 25% cancellation fee will be charged.
How to Activate eSIM: Scan the QR Code sent via email in the eSIM addition settings.
eSIM will be sent H+1. If you need it faster (used on the same day) please chat admin/write in the notes for immediate processing.
If the esim has been scanned, it is non-refundable.
If there is a problem with the product, you must contact our CS first via Whatsapp (+628986454071) to get a solution.
Entry pass generation will take 6-12 hours

Terms & Conditions: Ticket valid 30 days from the date of purchase If there is a problem with the product, you must contact our CS first via Whatsapp (+628986454071) to get a solution.
Cancellation Policy: No cancellation for this activity as per vendor policy
